content: Tailwind v4 integration: uses @tailwindcss/vite plugin (not postcss), @theme block in CSS for custom tokens, @import 'tailwindcss' at top of CSS file. Tokens available as Tailwind utility classes (e.g. bg-primary, text-on-surface).

bun test vs bun run test: 'bun test' uses Bun's own test runner (no vitest globals, no jsdom). Frontend tests must run with 'bun run test' (runs vitest via package.json script). The Makefile target uses 'bun run test'.

name: component-decomposition
description: Monolithic pages split into domain sub-components in components/<domain>/ (e.g. components/dashboard/StatCard.tsx, components/calendar/EventCard.tsx). Routes stay in routes/<path>/index.tsx and compose sub-components.

name: date-utils-module
description: Date utility extraction: duplicated formatDate/addDays/extractDate across planner, dashboard, and activity routes consolidated into web/src/utils/date.ts. Pattern: create utils/date.ts with formatDate, extractDate, addDays, formatDateStr, formatPeriod, getMonday, displayDate; import via @/utils/date alias.

content: Config lookup helpers consolidated into web/src/utils/config.ts: getTypeConfig/getTypeLabel/getTypeCategory/getStatusLabel/getDurationLabel all accept ActivitiesConfig|undefined (callers pass config?.activities). CATEGORY_COLORS, STATUS_BADGE_COLORS, MONTH_NAMES are single-source constants. Canonical categoryColors: bg-amber-50/border-amber-500/text-amber-900 for field, bg-blue-50/border-blue-400/text-blue-900 for non_field.

name: inline-activity-edit-ux
description: Inline-edit UX pattern for mobile field activities: unified detail+edit view, debounced auto-save (1500ms) via PATCH, status changes via tappable badge (separate PATCH /status endpoint, not debounced), Submit as only explicit action with pre-flight save flush. No Save button, no Cancel, no required field validation during editing. Separate useInlineActivityEditor hook encapsulates debounce, saveState machine, and mutation coordination.
